result.synthesis_reasoning: All sources agree that the symptom is observed at the frontend and that currencyservice is a critical upstream dependency. The Log Agent provides no direct error evidence, limiting confirmation of any upstream root. The Topology Agent supports currencyservice as a plausible upstream cause due to direct dependency, while the TCB-RCA results focus on the symptom service (frontend) as the initial propagation point in the absence of detectable timing cues. Given the unobserved upstream context (no logs for currencyservice in the interval) but strong structural plausibility, currencyservice is the most credible root candidate, with frontend as a secondary candidate due to the deterministic emphasis on the symptom component in the absence of temporal anomalies. The propagation path currencyservice -> frontend aligns with both the topology and the observed symptom, and it respects the rule to seek deeper root causes when evidence allows.
